ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Token
ObjectStates.Description:
뒷면에서 설정 가능.
동시에 한개만 사용하는걸 권장합니다.
ObjectStates.GMNotes: 준비되면 좌상단 고양이를 눌러주세요.º준비됐쓰!º모든 플레이어가 준비됐씁니다.º
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
ActivePlayers = {}
ReadyNoticeText = ""
AllReadyNoticeText = ""
EnableBlackButton = true

function UpdateSave()
    local buttons        = self.getInputs()
    local createNotice   = buttons[1]["value"]
    local readyNotice    = buttons[2]["value"]
    local allReadyNotice = buttons[3]["value"]
    local imageUrl       = buttons[4]["value"]
    local buttonText     = buttons[5]["value"]
    local offsetX        = buttons[6]["value"]
    local offsetY        = buttons[7]["value"]
    local width          = buttons[8]["value"]
    local height         = buttons[9]["value"]
    local fontSize       = buttons[10]["value"]

    local dataTable = {
        --cn = createNotice,
        --rn = readyNotice,
        --an = allReadyNotice,
        img = imageUrl,
        --btn = buttonText,
        x   = offsetX,
        y   = offsetY,
        w   = width,
        h   = height,
        f   = fontSize,
        black = EnableBlackButton,
    }
    self.script_state = JSON.encode(dataTable)
    
    local dataTableKor = createNotice .. "º" .. readyNotice .. "º" .. allReadyNotice .. "º" .. buttonText
    self.setGMNotes(dataTableKor)
end

function onSave()
    UpdateSave()
end

function onLoad(saved_data)
    local createNotice   = "Press button when you're ready."
    local readyNotice    = "I'm ready!"
    local allReadyNotice = "All players are ready."
    local imageUrl       = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/41197344857156762/FADBEE3C31C113617EAEEA2E183223F697616EF9/"
    local buttonText     = "READY!"
    local offsetX        = -730
    local offsetY        = 300
    local width          = 170
    local height         = 170
    local fontSize       = 30

    if saved_data != nil and saved_data != "" then
        local loadedData = JSON.decode(saved_data)

        --createNotice    = loadedData.cn
        --readyNotice     = loadedData.rn
        --allReadyNotice  = loadedData.an
        imageUrl        = loadedData.img
        --buttonText      = loadedData.btn
        offsetX         = loadedData.x
        offsetY         = loadedData.y
        width           = loadedData.w
        height          = loadedData.h
        fontSize        = loadedData.f
        EnableBlackButton = loadedData.black
    end

    local saved_data_kor = self.getGMNotes()
    if saved_data_kor != nil and saved_data_kor != "" then
        local loadedData = SplitString(saved_data_kor, "º")
        createNotice    = loadedData[1]
        readyNotice     = loadedData[2]
        allReadyNotice  = loadedData[3]
        buttonText      = loadedData[4]
    end

    local buttonParam = {
        function_owner = self,
        width          = 1000, 
        height         = 300,
        rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
        scale          = {1, 1, 1},
        font_size      = 200,
    }
    buttonParam["label"] = "버튼 생성"
    buttonParam["click_function"] = "EnableReadyButtons"
    buttonParam["position"] = {0, -0.1, -1.5}
    buttonParam["rotation"] = {0, 0, 180}
    self.createButton(buttonParam)
    buttonParam["label"] = "버튼 제거"
    buttonParam["click_function"] = "DisableReadyButtons"
    buttonParam["position"] = {0, -0.1, -0.8}
    self.createButton(buttonParam)
    if EnableBlackButton == true then
        buttonParam["label"] = "(V)"
    else
        buttonParam["label"] = "(  )"
    end
    buttonParam["tooltip"] = "Black 자리도 버튼 생성할지 여부"
    buttonParam["click_function"] = "ToggleBlackEnable"
    buttonParam["position"] = {-1.25, -0.1, -1.5}
    buttonParam["width"] = 200
    buttonParam["height"] = 200
    buttonParam["font_size"] = 100
    buttonParam["color"] = "Black"
    self.createButton(buttonParam)

    local inputParam = {
        function_owner = self,
        input_function = "Dummy",
        alignment      = 3,
        width          = 1400,
        height         = 180,
        rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
        scale          = {1, 1, 1},
        font_size      = 80,
        validation     = 1, --None
    }
    inputParam["label"] = "버튼 생성시 알림글(전체)"
    inputParam["position"] = {x=0, y=0.1, z=-1.7}
    inputParam["tooltip"] = "버튼 생성시 알림글(전체)"
    inputParam["value"] = createNotice
    self.createInput(inputParam)
    inputParam["label"] = "버튼 클릭시 알림글(개인)"
    inputParam["position"] = {x=0, y=0.1, z=-1.2}
    inputParam["tooltip"] = "버튼 클릭시 알림글(개인)"
    inputParam["value"] = readyNotice
    self.createInput(inputParam)
    inputParam["label"] = "전원이 버튼 클릭시 알림글(전체)"
    inputParam["position"] = {x=0, y=0.1, z=-0.7}
    inputParam["tooltip"] = "전원이 버튼 클릭시 알림글(전체)"
    inputParam["value"] = allReadyNotice
    self.createInput(inputParam)
    inputParam["label"] = "버튼 이미지 URL"
    inputParam["position"] = {x=0, y=0.1, z=1.1}
    inputParam["tooltip"] = "버튼에 표시될 이미지 URL"
    inputParam["height"] = 120
    inputParam["value"] = imageUrl
    self.createInput(inputParam)
    inputParam["label"] = "버튼 글자"
    inputParam["position"] = {x=0, y=0.1, z=1.5}
    inputParam["tooltip"] = "버튼에 표시될 글자"
    inputParam["value"] = buttonText
    self.createInput(inputParam)
    -- 좌표
    inputParam["label"] = "x"
    inputParam["position"] = {x=-0.5, y=0.1, z=0}
    inputParam["tooltip"] = "버튼 x좌표"
    inputParam["width"] = 450
    inputParam["height"] = 200
    inputParam["font_size"] = 160
    inputParam["validation"] = 2    --Integer
    inputParam["value"] = offsetX
    self.createInput(inputParam)
    inputParam["label"] = "y"
    inputParam["position"] = {x=0.5, y=0.1, z=0}
    inputParam["tooltip"] = "버튼 y좌표"
    inputParam["value"] = offsetY
    -- 크기
    self.createInput(inputParam)
    inputParam["label"] = "너비"
    inputParam["position"] = {x=-0.5, y=0.1, z=0.5}
    inputParam["tooltip"] = "버튼 너비"
    inputParam["width"] = 450
    inputParam["height"] = 200
    inputParam["font_size"] = 160
    inputParam["value"] = width
    self.createInput(inputParam)
    inputParam["label"] = "높이"
    inputParam["position"] = {x=0.5, y=0.1, z=0.5}
    inputParam["tooltip"] = "버튼 높이"
    inputParam["value"] = height
    self.createInput(inputParam)
    inputParam["label"] = "글자"
    inputParam["position"] = {x=0.5, y=0.1, z=2}
    inputParam["tooltip"] = "글자 크기"
    inputParam["value"] = fontSize
    self.createInput(inputParam)

    InitXml()
end

function onDestroy()
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyPanelScat", "active", "false")
end

function InitXml()
    local globalXml = nil
    local additionalXml = [[
        <Defaults>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat"
                active="false"
                onClick="]] .. self.guid .. [[/ReadyPlayerUI"
                rectAlignment="MiddleCenter"
                textColor="rgb(1, 1, 1)" textOutline="rgb(0, 0, 0)"
                allowDragging="true"
                returnToOriginalPositionWhenReleased="false"/>
        </Defaults>

        <Panel id="readyPanelScat" active="false">
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatBlack"  visibility="Black"></Button>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatRed"    visibility="Red"></Button>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatOrange" visibility="Orange"></Button>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatYellow" visibility="Yellow"></Button>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatGreen"  visibility="Green"></Button>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatTeal"   visibility="Teal"></Button>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatBlue"   visibility="Blue"></Button>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatPurple" visibility="Purple"></Button>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatPink"   visibility="Pink"></Button>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatWhite"  visibility="White"></Button>
            <Button class="readyButtonScat" id="readyButtonScatBrown"  visibility="Brown"></Button>
        </Panel>
    ]]

    local resultXml = nil
    globalXml = Global.UI.getXml()
    if globalXml == nil then
        resultXml = additionalXml
    elseif string.find(globalXml, "readyButtonScat") == nil then
        resultXml = additionalXml .. globalXml
    end

    if resultXml != nil then
        Global.UI.setXml(resultXml)
    end
end

function EnableReadyButtons(obj, playerColor, alt)
    local buttons = self.getInputs()
    local createNotice   = buttons[1]["value"]
    ReadyNoticeText      = buttons[2]["value"]
    AllReadyNoticeText   = buttons[3]["value"]
    local imageUrl       = buttons[4]["value"]
    local buttonText     = buttons[5]["value"]
    local offsetX        = buttons[6]["value"]
    local offsetY        = buttons[7]["value"]
    local width          = buttons[8]["value"]
    local height         = buttons[9]["value"]
    local fontSize       = buttons[10]["value"]
    
    ClearReadyButtons()
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyPanelScat", "active", "true")

    local buttonParam = {
        function_owner = self,
        --click_function = "ToggleReadyButton",
        width          = 400,
        height         = 400,
        rotation       = {0, 0, 180},
        scale          = {1, 1, 1},
        font_size      = 120,
    }

    local targetPlayers = getSeatedPlayers()
    if EnableBlackButton == true then
        local gmPlayer = Player["Black"]
        if gmPlayer != nil and gmPlayer.seated then
            table.insert(targetPlayers, #targetPlayers + 1, "Black")
        end
    end
    for k, color in ipairs(targetPlayers) do
        Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScat" .. color, "active",   "true")
        Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScat" .. color, "Image",    imageUrl)
        Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScat" .. color, "text",     buttonText)
        Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScat" .. color, "offsetXY", offsetX .. " " .. offsetY)
        Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScat" .. color, "width",    width)
        Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScat" .. color, "height",   height)
        Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScat" .. color, "fontSize", fontSize)
        
        -- 버튼 함수마다 색 배부
        local funcName = "Check" .. color
        _G[funcName] = function(obj, playerColor)
            local c = string.sub(funcName, 6)
            ToggleReadyButton(obj, c)
        end

        buttonParam["click_function"] = funcName
        buttonParam["label"] = color
        buttonParam["color"] = color
        buttonParam["position"] = {-0.9 + k % 3 * 0.9, -0.1, math.floor((k - 1) / 3) * 0.9}
        self.createButton(buttonParam)

        table.insert(ActivePlayers, #ActivePlayers + 1, color)
    end
    
    if createNotice != nil and createNotice != "" then
        broadcastToAll(createNotice)
    end
end

function DisableReadyButtons(obj, playerColor, alt)
    ClearReadyButtons()
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyPanelScat", "active", "false")

    BroadcastToColorSafe("버튼 제거.", playerColor)
end

function ClearReadyButtons()
    ActivePlayers = {}
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatBlack",  "active", "false")
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatRed",    "active", "false")
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatOrange", "active", "false")
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatYellow", "active", "false")
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatGreen",  "active", "false")
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatTeal",   "active", "false")
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatBlue",   "active", "false")
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatPurple", "active", "false")
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatPink",   "active", "false")
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatWhite",  "active", "false")
    Global.UI.setAttribute("readyButtonScatBrown",  "active", "false")

    local dummyCount = 3    -- 버튼 생성, 버튼 제거, 블랙 체크
    local buttonCount = #self.getButtons()
    for i = 1, buttonCount - dummyCount do
        self.removeButton(i + dummyCount - 1)
    end
end

function ToggleBlackEnable()
    if EnableBlackButton == true then
        EnableBlackButton = false
        self.editButton({
            index          = 2,
            label          = "(  )",
        })
    else
        EnableBlackButton = true
        self.editButton({
            index          = 2,
            label          = "(V)",
        })
    end

    UpdateSave()
end

function ReadyPlayerUI(player, alt, id)
    ToggleReadyButton(self, player.color)
end

function ToggleReadyButton(obj, playerColor, alt)
    local i = 0
    for k, button in ipairs(self.getButtons()) do
        if string.find(button.label, playerColor) != nil then
            i = button.index
            break
        end
    end

    local uiId = "readyButtonScat" .. playerColor
    local isActive = UI.getAttribute(uiId, "active")
    if isActive == "true" then
        self.editButton({
            index          = i,
            label          = playerColor .. "\n(V)",
            color          = "Grey",
        })
        UI.setAttribute(uiId, "active", "false")

        -- 준비 알림
        if ReadyNoticeText != nil and ReadyNoticeText != "" then
            BroadcastToColorSafe(ReadyNoticeText, playerColor)
        end

        local gmPlayer = Player["Black"]
        if gmPlayer != nil and gmPlayer.seated then
            BroadcastToColorSafe(playerColor .. ": " .. ReadyNoticeText, "Black", stringColorToRGB(playerColor))
        end

        -- 전체 준비 체크
        for k, color in ipairs(ActivePlayers) do
            if color != playerColor then -- attribute 적용이 한박자 느림
                if UI.getAttribute("readyButtonScat" .. color, "active") == "true" then
                    return
                end
            end
        end

        if AllReadyNoticeText != nil and AllReadyNoticeText != "" then
            broadcastToAll(AllReadyNoticeText)
        end
    else
        self.editButton({
            index          = i,
            label          = playerColor,
            color          = playerColor,
        })
        UI.setAttribute(uiId, "active", "true")
    end
end

function SplitString(inputString, separator)
    if inputString == nil or inputString == "" then
        return nil
    end
    
    -- 문자열 분리
    local parts = {}
    for part in string.gmatch(inputString, "[^" .. separator .. "]+") do
        table.insert(parts, part)
    end

    -- 앞뒤 공백 제거
    for i = 1, #parts do
        string.match(parts[i], "^%s*(.-)%s*$")
    end
    
    return parts
end

function BroadcastToColorSafe(message, playerColor, textColor)
    if playerColor == "Grey" then
        broadcastToColor(message, "Grey", textColor)
        return
    end

    local p = Player[playerColor]
    if p != nil and p.seated == true then
        broadcastToColor(message, playerColor, textColor)
    end
end

function Dummy(obj, color, input, stillEditing)
end
